title: Section 26261
text: An individual or firm, that is licensed by the Department of Insurance pursuant to Chapter 5 (commencing with Section 1621), Chapter 6 (commencing with Section 1760), or Chapter 8 (commencing with Section 1831) of Part 2 of Division 1 of the Insurance Code, does not commit a crime under California law solely for providing insurance or related services to persons licensed to engage in commercial cannabis activity pursuant to this division. (Added by Stats. 2022, Ch. 393, Sec. 1. (AB 2568) Effective January 1, 2023.) BPC Business and Professions Code - BPC
